eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

isNonceUsed(address,uint256).details: Used by the facilitator to check nonce freshness off-chain before submitting.

params.interfaceId: The interface ID to check (as per ERC-165)

returns._0: True if the contract supports the interface, false otherwise

transferFrom(address,address,uint256,uin.details: Parallel entry point to `transfer()` — allows a third-party facilitator (e.g. x402)      to submit a confidential transfer on behalf of the sender after verifying an off-chain      EIP-712 signature. Same downstream logic as `transfer()`: verifies the client ZK proof,      enqueues the action, stores the ciphertext. The MPC processes it identically — it uses      the sender's ephemeral BabyJubJub key from the ciphertext, not the Ethereum submitter.

params.beta: Random challenge provided by the client for proof compression.
params.ciphertext: Encrypted shares of (amount, r) plus sender's ephemeral BabyJubJub pk.
params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the signature is invalid.
params.nonce: Unique nonce per sender for replay protection.
params.proof: Compressed Groth16 client proof (4 field elements).
params.receiver: The recipient of the confidential transfer.
params.sender: The authorizing payer (recovered from the EIP-712 signature).
params.signature: EIP-712 signature over the TransferFromAuthorization struct.

DOMAIN_TAG().notice: The immutable domain tag of this contract

contractCompCheck(bytes4,bytes32).notice: Verifies that this contract matches a given interface and domain tag

isNonceUsed(address,uint256).notice: Returns whether a given (sender, nonce) has been consumed by a transferFrom.

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: Checks whether the contract implements a given interface

transferFrom(address,address,uint256,uin.notice: Facilitator-submitted transfer with EIP-712 authorization from the sender.
